<!-- See https://github.com/stoplightio/elements/blob/main/docs/getting-started/elements/elements-options.md for config --> <!doctype html> <html lang="en"> <head> <meta charset="utf-8"> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1, shrink-to-fit=no"> <title>{!! $metadata['title'] !!}</title> <!-- Embed elements Elements via Web Component --> <script src="https://unpkg.com/@stoplight/elements/web-components.min.js"></script> <link rel="stylesheet" href="https://unpkg.com/@stoplight/elements/styles.min.css"> <style> body { height: 100vh; } </style> </head> <body> <elements-api @foreach($htmlAttributes as $attribute => $value) {{-- Attributes specified first override later ones --}} {!! $attribute !!}="{!! $value !!}" @endforeach apiDescriptionUrl="{!! $metadata['openapi_spec_url'] !!}" router="hash" layout="sidebar" hideTryIt="{!! ($tryItOut['enabled'] ?? true) ? '' : 'true'!!}" @if(!empty($metadata['logo'])) logo="{!! $metadata['logo'] !!}" @endif /> </body> </html>
